source.description: Six-panel generated raster contact sheet reviewed before cropping; final panel saved as the finished master.
source.notes: Contact-sheet-first workflow, no labels or embedded text.

process_strategy: The trowel stays diagonal at one scale while blade, handle, ferrule, grain, soil, and shading are introduced before the final cleanup frame.

final_elements.name: diagonal center guide and blade mass
final_elements.description: A long diagonal guide with a light oval/teardrop mass for the metal blade.

final_elements.name: teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette
final_elements.description: A pointed garden trowel blade attached to a rounded wooden handle.

final_elements.name: blade shoulder and metal ferrule
final_elements.description: The neck where the blade meets the handle, plus a small metal ferrule band.

final_elements.name: hanging hole, blade edge, and wood grain
final_elements.description: A small handle hole, an inner blade edge, and a few wood-grain lines.

final_elements.name: soil crumbs, soft shadow, and restrained brown-gray shading
final_elements.description: Small soil crumbs near the blade, a soft cast shadow, and light tone on the existing handle and metal blade.

frames.visible_job: Sets the diagonal handle axis and a light blade mass.
introduces: diagonal center guide and blade mass

frames.visible_job: Turns the guides into a teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette.
introduces: teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette
requires_prior_elements: diagonal center guide and blade mass

frames.visible_job: Adds the blade shoulder and ferrule band where the handle meets the blade.
requires_prior_elements: teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette

frames.visible_job: Adds the hanging hole, blade edge, and wood-grain lines.
introduces: hanging hole, blade edge, and wood grain
requires_prior_elements: teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette

frames.visible_job: Adds soil crumbs, a soft shadow, and restrained tone to the existing blade and handle.
introduces: soil crumbs, soft shadow, and restrained brown-gray shading
requires_prior_elements: teardrop blade and rounded handle silhouette
hanging hole, blade edge, and wood grain

final_step.visible_job: Darkens keeper contours and clarifies the existing blade, handle, ferrule, grain, soil crumbs, tone, and shadow.
allowed_changes: clarification of existing ferrule, hanging hole, blade edge, grain, and soil crumbs

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
